title: How It Works
subtitle: Our streamlined procedure ensures a smooth transition for candidates  throughout the international recruitment journey.

steps.title: Register Your Interest
steps.desc: Complete a short form with your nursing qualification, German level, and timeline. Join our WhatsApp community for peer support and updates.

steps.title: Eligibility & Assessment
steps.desc: We review your profile against verified school and Ausbildung requirements and share an honest readiness summary.

steps.title: School & Opportunity Matching
steps.desc: We connect you with accredited German nursing schools and healthcare institutions that fit your profile.

steps.title: Application & Documents
steps.desc: Guided document preparation, translation verification, and school application submission with our support team.

steps.title: Visa & Embassy Support
steps.desc: Checklist-driven visa preparation, appointment guidance, and coordination for your embassy interview.

steps.title: Pre-Departure Orientation
steps.desc: Virtual or in-person session on German healthcare culture, accommodation, banking, transport, and what to expect on arrival.

steps.title: Arrival & Integration
steps.desc: Optional first-90-days support: Anmeldung guidance, insurance registration, and check-ins as you start your role.
